content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves left ahead with the dashed center line sweeping to the upper left, and the car appears well-positioned on the inside of the curve continuing the left turn.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 27 + 5 = 32
Waypoint 32: (7.283682, 1.715273)
Car position: (6.843576, 1.019482)
Bearing = atan2(1.715273 - 1.019482, 7.283682 - 6.843576) = atan2(0.695791, 0.440106) = atan2(1.5810) ≈ 57.7°
Current heading: 36.528°
Delta = 57.7 - 36.528 = 21.2° → moderate-sharp left turn needed

```json

  "reasoning": "Track continues curving left ahead with delta +21.2° to waypoint 32, so I maintain 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve smoothly.",

    "After the left curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and moderate curves",
    "Curve sharpens at wp27-35 (y increases from 1.0 to 2.0), monitor delta closely",
    "Car heading increasing from ~0° to ~37° confirming we are deep in the left curve",
    "Delta ~21° at wp32 confirms moderate-sharp left curve — maintain 15° left steering",
    "Heading increasing steadily each step (~7-8°/step) — curve is consistent and predictable"
  ],

  },

  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
